# Deprecated Tool

> **DEPRECATED**: This product is no longer maintained. Please migrate to DataFlow.

## Overview
Deprecated Tool was our first analytics product, launched in 2021. It served
customers well but has been superseded by DataFlow which offers better
performance and more features.

## Migration Path
Existing customers should migrate to DataFlow by December 2025.

### Migration Steps
1. Export your dashboards using the export API
2. Set up a DataFlow account
3. Import dashboards using the DataFlow migration tool
4. Verify data accuracy
5. Decommission Deprecated Tool access

## Support
Limited support is available until end-of-life (December 2025).
